Theorem a1i 11
Description: Inference introducing an antecedent. Inference associated with ax-1 6. Its associated inference is a1ii 2. See conventions 30492 for a definition of "associated inference". (Contributed by NM, 29-Dec-1992.)
Hypothesis
Ref Expression
a1i.1
Assertion
Ref Expression
a1i
Proof of Theorem a1i
StepHypRef Expression
1 a1i.1 . 2
2 ax-1 6 . 2
31, 2ax-mp 5 1
